title: Species at risk programs and activities: contact us - Canada.ca
content:
## Species at risk programs and activities: contact us
- Contacts for more information
- Contact the Public Registry Office
- Contact an Employee of the Government of Canada
- Canadian Wildlife Service Regional Offices
For more information, publications, questions or comments concerning Species at Risk programs and activities, please contact the following:
Environment and Climate Change Canada Public Inquiries Centre 7 th floor, Fontaine Building 200 Sacré-Coeur Boulevard Gatineau QC  K1A 0H3 Tel: (819) 938-3860 Tel (in Canada only): (800) 668-6767 E-mail: Enviroinfo@ec.gc.ca
Fisheries and Oceans Canada Communications Branch 200 Kent Street 13th Floor, Station 13228 Ottawa, Ontario Canada K1A OE6 Tel: (613) 993-0999 Fax: (613) 990-1866 E-mail: info@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Parks Canada National Office 25 Eddy Street Gatineau, Quebec Canada K1A 0M5 Tel: (888) 773-8888 E-mail: information@pc.gc.ca

## Public Registry Office
For more information, questions or comments on the Species at Risk Public Registry, please contact the following:
Species at Risk Public Registry Office 351 St. Joseph Boulevard, 21st Floor Gatineau, Quebec Canada K1A 0H3 Tel: (800) 668-6767 Fax: (819) 953-2225 E-mail: SARAregistry@ec.gc.ca
Please note that any personal information collected on the comment form, is subject to the terms and conditions under the Privacy Act .

## Employee of the Government of Canada
To contact an employee of the Government of Canada directly, please consult the following: Government Electronic Directory Service

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
